title: Create immutable Work Item Start Receipt
outOfScope: product source code outside Work Item lifecycle governance

sources.reason: Defines Work Item 4 Start Receipt objective and required validation path.
Aligns Work Item, Contract, baseline, and lifecycle terminology.
Existing Work Item creation lifecycle to extend with receipt creation.
Existing Contract validation boundary for Start Receipt binding.
Existing PR aggregate validation boundary for immutable receipt evidence.
Canonical branch and Work Item lifecycle documentation.

riskAssessment.reason: The change strengthens lifecycle evidence across start and PR checks while preserving historic archives.

executionDecision.reason: User explicitly authorized the approved Work Item execution loop.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: A1: ai-start creates a Git-tracked Start Receipt containing Work Item ID, Base Commit, Start Timestamp, Initial Scope Digest, and Contract Skeleton Digest before implementation changes.
A2: Start Receipt validation rejects missing, malformed, tampered, base-mismatched, digest-mismatched, or untracked receipts and accepts an intact receipt bound to the Contract and branch base.
A3: Contract and PR checks enforce receipt immutability and binding while historic Work Item evidence remains readable and existing lifecycle behavior stays compatible.
A4: Focused start, Contract, PR aggregate, and full quality tests cover receipt success and failure scenarios, and the repository workflow documents the receipt boundary.
guidelines: Start Receipt fields must be repository-relative or content digests; never record machine-specific paths or credentials.
Receipt validation must be fail-closed and use the Contract baseCommit as the immutable lifecycle boundary.
Historic Work Item Contract and Summary archives remain read-only compatible unless they declare Start Receipt evidence.
The receipt proves creation-time state; it must not be treated as proof that implementation or PR review succeeded.

intent.problem: The Work Item Contract records a base commit but does not prove when the Contract and initial Scope were created relative to implementation changes.
constraints: Create the receipt during ai-start and keep it Git-tracked under .ai/work-items/starts/.
Bind the receipt to the Contract baseCommit, initial scope digest, and Contract skeleton digest.
Do not break historic archive validation or existing ai-start tests that do not inspect receipt fields.
intent.rationale: An immutable, content-addressed Start Receipt closes the timing gap without relying on mutable file timestamps or archive history.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the approved implementation loop, including Makefile and governance lifecycle changes.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
